creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223385
Patch for yt-dlp

Update yt-dlp to 2021.03.15

Migrate to same build logic as www/youtube_dl
Update project URL
Remove zip build dependency
Make mutagen optional
Disable self-updating

Compile and run tested on FreeBSD 13.0-RC1 (aarch64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
